mapper.sql: COALESCE(CAST(cap.rcrt_bgng_dt AS DATE), CAST(cap.reg_dttm AS DATE))
COALESCE(CAST(cap2.rcrt_bgng_dt AS DATE), CAST(cap2.reg_dttm AS DATE))
COALESCE(CAST(cap4.rcrt_bgng_dt AS DATE), CAST(cap4.reg_dttm AS DATE))
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT sido_nm AS value, sido_nm AS label FROM apt_complex WHERE sido_nm IS NOT NULL ORDER BY sido_nm

SELECT ac.apt_cmplex_no AS value, ac.apt_cmplex_nm AS label FROM apt_complex ac WHERE 1 = 1
ORDER BY ac.apt_cmplex_nm

SELECT LPAD(m.lv, 2, '0') AS month, NVL(a.announcement_cnt, 0) AS announcementCnt, NVL(c.contract_cnt, 0) AS contractCnt FROM ( SELECT LEVEL lv FROM dual CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 12 ) m LEFT JOIN ( SELECT TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(, 'MM')) AS mm, COUNT(DISTINCT cap.ann_no) AS announcement_cnt FROM center_ann_board_post cap INNER JOIN center_board_instance cbi ON cbi.board_no = cap.board_no INNER JOIN apt_complex ac ON ac.apt_cmplex_no = cbi.apt_cmplex_no WHERE NVL(cap.del_yn, 'N') = 'N' AND TO_CHAR(, 'YYYY') = TO_CHAR(#{year})
GROUP BY TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(, 'MM')) ) a ON a.mm = m.lv LEFT JOIN ( SELECT TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(, 'MM')) AS mm, COUNT(DISTINCT rl.ho_no) AS contract_cnt FROM rent_ctrt rc INNER JOIN rent_listing rl ON rl.rent_lstg_no = rc.rent_lstg_no INNER JOIN apt_detail ad ON ad.ho_no = rl.ho_no INNER JOIN apt_unit au ON au.dong_no = ad.dong_no INNER JOIN apt_complex ac ON ac.apt_cmplex_no = au.apt_cmplex_no LEFT JOIN center_ann_board_post cap ON cap.ann_no = rl.ann_no WHERE rc.ctrt_stts_cd = 'APPROVED' AND TO_CHAR(, 'YYYY') = TO_CHAR(#{year})
GROUP BY TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(, 'MM')) ) c ON c.mm = m.lv ORDER BY m.lv

SELECT listing_status_cd AS listingStatusCd, listing_status_nm AS listingStatusNm, rent_listing_cnt AS rentListingCnt, NVL(ROUND(rent_listing_cnt / NULLIF(SUM(rent_listing_cnt) OVER (), 0) * 100, 1), 0) AS ratio FROM ( SELECT NVL(rl.deal_stts_cd, 'UNKNOWN') AS listing_status_cd, CASE NVL(rl.deal_stts_cd, 'UNKNOWN') WHEN 'AVL' THEN '임대 가능' WHEN 'ING' THEN '계약 진행' WHEN 'CMP' THEN '계약 완료' ELSE '기타' END AS listing_status_nm, COUNT(DISTINCT rl.ho_no) AS rent_listing_cnt FROM rent_listing rl INNER JOIN apt_detail ad ON ad.ho_no = rl.ho_no INNER JOIN apt_unit au ON au.dong_no = ad.dong_no INNER JOIN apt_complex ac ON ac.apt_cmplex_no = au.apt_cmplex_no LEFT JOIN center_ann_board_post cap ON cap.ann_no = rl.ann_no WHERE TO_CHAR(, 'YYYY') = TO_CHAR(#{year})
GROUP BY NVL(rl.deal_stts_cd, 'UNKNOWN') ) ORDER BY CASE listing_status_cd WHEN 'AVL' THEN 1 WHEN 'ING' THEN 2 WHEN 'CMP' THEN 3 ELSE 9 END, listing_status_nm

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY ac.apt_cmplex_nm) AS rn, ac.apt_cmplex_no AS aptCmplexNo, ac.apt_cmplex_nm AS aptCmplexNm, TRIM(ac.sido_nm || ' ' || ac.sigungu_nm) AS region, NVL(ac.unit_cnt, 0) AS unitCnt, NVL(ann.announcement_cnt, 0) AS announcementCnt, NVL(lst.rent_listing_cnt, 0) AS rentListingCnt, NVL(ctrt.approved_contract_cnt, 0) AS approvedContractCnt, NVL(ROUND(NVL(ctrt.approved_contract_cnt, 0) / NULLIF(NVL(lst.rent_listing_cnt, 0), 0) * 100, 1), 0) AS rentContractRate FROM apt_complex ac LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cbi.apt_cmplex_no, COUNT(DISTINCT cap.ann_no) AS announcement_cnt FROM center_ann_board_post cap INNER JOIN center_board_instance cbi ON cbi.board_no = cap.board_no WHERE NVL(cap.del_yn, 'N') = 'N' AND TO_CHAR(, 'YYYY') = TO_CHAR(#{search.year}) GROUP BY cbi.apt_cmplex_no ) ann ON ann.apt_cmplex_no = ac.apt_cmplex_no LEFT JOIN ( SELECT au.apt_cmplex_no, COUNT(DISTINCT rl.ho_no) AS rent_listing_cnt FROM rent_listing rl INNER JOIN apt_detail ad ON ad.ho_no = rl.ho_no INNER JOIN apt_unit au ON au.dong_no = ad.dong_no LEFT JOIN center_ann_board_post cap ON cap.ann_no = rl.ann_no WHERE TO_CHAR(, 'YYYY') = TO_CHAR(#{search.year}) GROUP BY au.apt_cmplex_no ) lst ON lst.apt_cmplex_no = ac.apt_cmplex_no LEFT JOIN ( SELECT au.apt_cmplex_no, COUNT(DISTINCT rl.ho_no) AS approved_contract_cnt FROM rent_ctrt rc INNER JOIN rent_listing rl ON rl.rent_lstg_no = rc.rent_lstg_no INNER JOIN apt_detail ad ON ad.ho_no = rl.ho_no INNER JOIN apt_unit au ON au.dong_no = ad.dong_no LEFT JOIN center_ann_board_post cap ON cap.ann_no = rl.ann_no WHERE rc.ctrt_stts_cd = 'APPROVED' AND TO_CHAR(, 'YYYY') = TO_CHAR(#{search.year}) GROUP BY au.apt_cmplex_no ) ctrt ON ctrt.apt_cmplex_no = ac.apt_cmplex_no WHERE 1 = 1
) WHERE rn BETWEEN #{pagingVO.startRow} AND #{pagingVO.endRow} ORDER BY rn
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM apt_complex ac WHERE 1 = 1
